info.title: Thrift Store API
info.description: API for the Thrift Store marketplace platform. Supports buyer-seller transactions, JWT authentication, Stripe payment processing, and admin moderation.

password.description: Must contain uppercase, lowercase, number, and special character

get.summary: Get seller profile with active listings
List paid payment receipts for seller
Create Stripe Checkout session for listing fee

post.summary: Submit a review (buyer, on completed order)

patch.summary: Mark a single notification as read

post.summary: Report a product, review, or user

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Search by name, email, or phone
